title: React SEO
description: Use SSR/SSG/pre-rendering, reliable metadata, crawlable links, and lightweight public pages for React sites.
do: Use SSR/SSG or pre-rendering for public SEO pages where possible.
Render title, meta, canonical, Open Graph, and JSON-LD reliably.
Avoid hash routing for public SEO pages.
dont: Make public SEO pages client-only without reason.
Delay SEO metadata until after hydration.
Hide content behind API calls without fallback.
Use button-only navigation for crawlable routes.
